summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shíntergy construction equipment rental platform after bug fixes. All critical functionality working perfectly: chat widget opens correctly, complete quote generation flow functional, backend APIs operational, PDF generation working, email service functional with verified addresses, and MongoDB persistence confirmed.

email_restrictions.issue: Test mode restriction - can only send to verified email (cezeulor123@gmail.com)
email_restrictions.note: Working correctly with verified email address

mobile_issues.issue: Mobile menu button not found in responsive design

passed_tests: Chat widget opens correctly when 'Cotizar Ahora' clicked
Complete chat flow: service selection → duration → additional services → location → contact form
Service selection: Retroexcavadora 420F 4x4 working
Duration selection: Por Semana working
Additional services: GPS and Seguro extendido selection working
Location input: Monterrey, NL accepted
Contact form: name, email, phone fields working
Quote generation with verified email (cezeulor123@gmail.com)
Backend API: /api/ root endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API: /api/quotes/create (200 OK)
Backend API: /api/quotes/{id} retrieval (200 OK)
Backend API: /api/quotes listing (200 OK)
Price calculation with IVA: $25,404 MXN for Retroexcavadora + GPS + Insurance
PDF generation: files created successfully in /app/backend/generated_pdfs/
Email sending: successful with verified address
MongoDB persistence: quotes saved with all data
Frontend success confirmation: toast notification displayed
Desktop navigation menu: all items (Servicios, Ventajas, Proceso, Galería, Contacto)
WhatsApp button functionality
Footer with social media links
Landing page load with all sections

success_percentage.backend: 100% (all APIs working, email functional with verified address)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (complete chat flow working, minor mobile menu issue)
